buildCommand: cd enprotec-operations && npm install && npm run build
installCommand: npm install && cd enprotec-operations && npm install

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co; font-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
